definitions: It is extremely foolish or unwise to do something.
It is the ultimate act of foolishness to perform a particular action.
examples: It is the height of stupidity to leave your doors unlocked in this neighborhood.
To argue with the referee after the game is the height of stupidity.
It is the height of stupidity to invest all your savings in a single volatile stock.
lemma: it is the height of stupidity to do sth
synonyms: it is utterly foolish to do sth
it is incredibly stupid to do sth
it is the epitome of foolishness to do sth
source: it is the height of stupidity to do sth
